name: Blind Corridor Oscilloscope
description: Map a hidden branching corridor through fading local sonar, then maintain one continuous pointer hold from START to EXIT while correcting deterministic coordinate drift.
natural_language: Hover across the oscilloscope to map the hidden green corridor and its amber false echoes. Once START arms, press and hold it continuously, steer the drifting green probe through every hidden gate to EXIT, release there, and certify the trace record.

metadata.variant_count_kind: smooth corridor controls, branch count and geometry, sonar radius, wall tolerance, and crosswind functions
metadata.notes: Only START and EXIT are initially visible. Ordinary hover emits recoverable fading sonar, while the committed pointer hold is independently replayed from raw samples through deterministic crosswind, wall distance, ordered checkpoints, and collision re-arm events.
